# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:14-slim

RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get install -y build-essential libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev libreadline-dev libsqlite3-dev wget curl uuid-dev
RUN apt-get clean

# Set working directory to /app and copy package.json and other files into it.
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./

# Install dependencies
RUN npm install

# Copy remaining application code
COPY . .

# Expose port 3000 for our web app
EXPOSE 3000

# Run command to start the app when container starts
CMD ["node", "index.js"]
